response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience with SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload performance analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is predominantly in full-stack web development, DevOps, and open-source tooling, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or SIMD/MIMD expertise.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical leadership in tooling
Extensive background in performance-critical systems and low-latency applications
concerns: No experience with SoC, IP, or AI accelerator hardware modeling
Lacks deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture background
Education is a BS in CS — insufficient without 8+ years of relevant hardware-focused experience
